name: calendar
description: A standalone, inline month-grid date picker primitive (WAI-ARIA APG grid pattern); month nav with Lucide chevrons, roving-tabindex keyboard navigation (arrows + Home/End + PageUp/Down), single or range selection, today/selected/disabled states, min/max bounds, locale-aware first-day-of-week.
docs: Register <lv-calendar> by importing components/ui/calendar.ts from your entry point. Set `mode` ('single' | 'range'). Bind `value`: in single mode an ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD), in range mode 'start,end'. Optional `min` / `max` (ISO) bound the selectable range; set the `isDisabled` property to a `(iso) => boolean` predicate to disable individual days; `weekStart` (0=Sun, 1=Mon default) and `locale` control the header. Listen for `lv-change` to receive the new value string.
